hero.title:
Plan your week.
Free your mind.
hero.sub: Plan lunch and dinner once. The shopping list builds itself: precise, no waste. And you stop asking yourself "what's for dinner?" every night.

how.label: How it works
how.title:
One decision on Sunday.
Seven days sorted.
how.sub: Three quick steps. Then forget about it until next week.

step1.title: Pick lunch and dinner for the week
step1.desc: Add recipes from the cookbook in one tap, or use the ones you already saved. Fourteen meals decided once and for all.

step2.title: The shopping list builds itself
step2.desc: weekset adds up the ingredients and scales portions to your household. You only buy what you need: no food rotting in the fridge, no money thrown away.

step3.title: Shop together as a family
step3.desc: Everyone checks off what they grab: the list updates in real time for all. No duplicates, no more "did you get the bread?" messages.

catalog.label: The cookbook
catalog.title:
92 everyday recipes.
In one tap.
catalog.sub: Not a gourmet cookbook. Home cooking, ready to add to your menu. Change anything you like: it becomes yours.

features.label: Features
features.title:
Everything you need.
Nothing that distracts.

items.title: Weekly menu
items.desc: Plan all 7 days. Copy and paste entire weeks when your household rhythm repeats.

items.title: No waste
items.desc: Quantities scaled to your household. You buy what you actually cook; no forgotten bags left to rot.

items.title: Shared shopping
items.desc: 8-character invite code. The family checks off items in real time: no double buys, no messages.

items.title: ✦ AI import
items.desc: Add a recipe from text, photo or voice message. weekset turns it into a ready-made card.

cta.sub: Free for those who start now: no limits, forever.
cta.note: No credit card · iPhone and Android · 2 minutes to start

meta.title: weekset · Plan your week
meta.description: Plan lunch and dinner once. The shopping list builds itself: precise, no waste.
